source_text: We have already been securing long lead equipment and planning to mobilize construction of these two buildings beginning in Q1 2026.

source_text: The combined results from JPMorgan Chase, American Express, Capital One and Citigroup represent the money machine that could be at risk if the Trump administration continues to push for a federal cap on credit-card interest rates.
target_text: JP모건 체이스, 아메리칸 익스프레스, 캐피털 원, 그리고 씨티그룹의 통합 실적은 소위 '돈 버는 기계(money machine)'라 불릴 만큼 막대한 수익을 보여주지만, 만약 트럼프 행정부가 신용카드 이자율에 대한 연방 차원의 상한제 도입을 계속 밀어붙인다면 이 수익 구조는 위험에 처할 수 있습니다.

source_text: We hypothesize that a high placebo response in this clinical trial led to a lack of separation of the suzetrigine and placebo response curves.
target_text: 우리는 이번 임상 시험에서 나타난 높은 위약 반응(placebo response)이 수제트리진(suzetrigine)과 위약군 간의 반응 곡선이 명확하게 갈라지지 않는 결과를 초래한 원인일 가능성이 있다고 판단하고 있습니다.

source_text: Also, the FTC is sending the complaint to two other individuals that signed no-poach agreements while working for the companies.
target_text: 또한, FTC는 해당 기업에서 근무하는 동안 채용 금지 약정에 서명한 다른 두 개인에게도 소장을 발송하고 있습니다.

source_text: Transocean is a leading international provider of offshore contract drilling services for oil and gas wells. The company specializes in technically demanding sectors of the global offshore drilling business with a particular focus on ultra-deepwater and harsh environment drilling services and operates the highest specification floating offshore drilling fleet in the world.
target_text: Transocean은 석유 및 가스 유정의 해양 계약 시추 서비스를 제공하는 선도적인 국제 기업입니다. 동사는 전 세계 해양 시추 사업 중에서도 기술적으로 까다로운 분야, 특히 초심해 및 혹독한 환경 시추 서비스에 특화되어 있으며, 세계 최고 사양의 부유식 해양 시추 선단을 운영하고 있습니다.

source_text: This information will be updated as appropriate to reflect decisions of the Federal Open Market Committee or the Board of Governors regarding details of the Federal Reserve's operational tools and approach used to implement monetary policy.

source_text: Using ambient air as feedstock, Linde produces oxygen, nitrogen and argon through several air separation processes of which cryogenic air separation is the most prevalent.

source_text: The Company is subject to U.S. environmental regulations and there are critical regulatory differences between the U.S. and the European Union that result in meaningful differences in the makeup of corresponding end-products and reported emissions metrics for the Company's heritage cement business.

source_text: CrowdStrike is both the armor and intelligence layer that keeps each agentic identity secure.

source_text: As a global leader at the intersection of healthcare and consumer goods, we are the world’s largest pure-play consumer health company by revenue with $15.5 billion in Net sales in the fiscal year 2024.
target_text: 헬스케어와 소비재의 접점에 위치한 글로벌 리더로서, 당사는 2024 회계연도 기준 155억 달러의 순매출액을 기록한 매출액 기준 세계 최대의 (pure-play) 소비자 헬스케어 단일 사업 기업입니다.

source_text: From this position and using pre-existing development and operating assets as a nucleus for its work, Clearway Group is now developing multi-technology generation complexes to serve gigawatt-class co-located data centers across five states, with the potential for these developments to create accretive investment opportunities for Clearway Energy, Inc. in the early 2030s.
target_text: 이러한 입지를 바탕으로, Clearway Group은 기존의 개발 및 운영 자산을 사업의 핵심(nucleus)으로 삼아 현재 5개 주에서 기가와트급 발전소 인접형(co-located) 데이터 센터에 전력을 공급할 복합 기술 발전 단지(multi-technology generation complexes)를 개발하고 있습니다. 이러한 개발 사업들은 2030년대 초반 Clearway Energy, Inc.에 수익 증대형(accretive) 투자 기회를 창출할 잠재력을 보유하고 있습니다

source_text: The data center project, led by International Electric Power, will be powered by 944 MW, that's right, nearly 1 GW, from behind-the-meter natural gas combined cycle turbines, supplemented by battery storage and backed up with an existing interconnection with the electric grid.
target_text: International Electric Power가 주도하는 데이터 센터 프로젝트는 944MW, 즉 거의 1GW에 달하는 전력을 수요지측(behind-the-meter) 천연가스 복합화력 터빈으로 공급받으며, 배터리 저장 설비로 보완되고 기존 전력망 연계 설비를 통해 백업됩니다.

source_text: The Federal Trade Commission is taking action against two companies and two individuals that participated in “no-poach agreements,” which are designed to suppress workers’ wages and prevent them from pursuing better job opportunities.

source_text: With the expanded partnership, we're further increasing our ability to shape planograms, prioritize SKUs, align promotional periods, and bring a unified commercial strategy to life across channels.

source_text: We have used Seaway's Texas City terminal to partially load Very Large Crude Carrier ("VLCC") tankers, with the remaining volumes subsequently loaded on such vessels using lightering operations in the Gulf of Mexico.

source_text: And this means two things. Very specifically. One is permissionless twenty-four-seven tradable public company stock tokens. And two, private company stock tokens.

source_text: The SEC’s complaint, filed in United States District Court for the Southern District of California, charges Rosen and RB Capital with securities fraud in violation of Section 17(a) of the Securities Act of 1933; and Section 10(b) of the Securities and Exchange Act of 1934 and Rule 10b-5 thereunder.

source_text: Lower prices and changes in our development plans could also result in non-cash impairments in the book value of our oil and gas properties and midstream infrastructure or downward adjustments to our estimated proved reserves.

source_text: Given our portfolio mix, successive selections under the IRA may effectively front-load the post-exclusivity revenue cliff by accelerating price compression prior to the expiry of patent and regulatory protections.

source_text: In addition to this approach, we implemented a hybrid bitcoin acquisition strategy, balancing mining with opportunistic market purchases, leveraging approximately $2.2 billion in aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes (the “2024 Convertible Notes”), of which $1.9 billion bears no interest.

source_text: PNC and PNC Bank must maintain risk-based capital above the minimum risk-based capital ratio requirements plus its SCB (in the case of PNC) or capital conservation buffer (in the case of PNC Bank) in order to avoid limitations on capital distributions, including paying dividends and executing repurchases or redemptions of any Tier 1 capital instrument, such as common and qualifying preferred stock, and certain discretionary incentive compensation payments.

source_text: This isn't about technology for technology's sake. source_text: Restrictive measures can increase the cost or limit the availability of the Company’s products and the components and rare earths and other raw materials that go into them. Restrictive measures can also require the Company to change suppliers, restructure business relationships and operations, refrain from offering and distributing or cease to offer and distribute affected products, services and third-party applications to its customers, and increase the prices of its products and services.
target_text: 제한 조치는 회사의 제품과 그 구성 요소, 희토류 및 기타 원자재의 비용을 증가시키거나 가용성을 제한할 수 있습니다. 또한 제한 조치로 인해 회사는 공급업체를 변경하고, 비즈니스 관계 및 운영을 구조조정하며, 영향을 받는 제품, 서비스 및 제3자 애플리케이션의 제공 및 배포를 자제하거나 중단해야 하고, 제품 및 서비스 가격을 인상해야 할 수도 있습니다.

source_text: We produce renewable fiber-based packaging and pulp products with manufacturing operations in North America, Latin America, Europe and North Africa.
target_text: 우리는 북미, 라틴 아메리카, 유럽 및 북아프리카에 제조 시설을 두고 재생 가능한 섬유 기반 포장재와 펄프 제품을 생산합니다.

source_text: A number of factors can cause the scanner data to vary from reported results, such as promotions and incentives, and the success of such programs, timing of acquisitions, and timing of customer orders, which can vary from time to time based on various inventory builds for promotions, cash management programs, limited-time offering programs, as well as a number of other factors.
target_text: 프로모션 및 인센티브의 시행과 그 성과, 인수 시점, 고객 주문 시점 등 다양한 요인이 소매점 판매 데이터(scanner data)와 보고된 실적 간의 차이를 발생시킬 수 있으며, 이러한 요인들은 프로모션을 위한 다양한 재고 확충, 현금 관리 프로그램, 한정판 제공 프로그램 및 기타 여러 요인에 따라 수시로 변동될 수 있습니다.
